name: Netcapital Inc.
summary: Netcapital Inc. operates as a fintech company. It helps companies at various stages to build, grow, and fund businesses with a range of services from strategic advice to raising capital. The company also operates netcapital.com, an online private investment platform that connects entrepreneurs and investors, enabling companies to raise capital digitally. Its Netcapital.com provides investor access to pre-IPO investment opportunities, as well as potential liquidity in privately held shares via a secondary transfer platform. The company also offers advisory services in a range of verticals, including biotechnology, technology, and public policy. In addition, it acts as an incubator and accelerator, taking equity stakes in various disruptive start-ups. Netcapital Inc. is based in Boston, Massachusetts.
